profiles.label: Customs / Trade Boundary Reviewer
required_credential_evidence: Licensed customs broker status, customs brokerage employment, or documented customs/trade compliance qualification.
Jurisdiction and product scope statement.
Dated source list or ruling/official correspondence if stronger tariff wording is requested.
profiles.scope: HS candidate, tariff route, importer responsibility, broker-boundary, and customs-language review.

source_requirements.claim_boundary: Reference source only; does not prove a broker relationship, review, or signoff.
Reference source only; does not replace CBSA, broker, customs, or legal review.
source_requirements.source_name: CBSA Import Commercial Goods Into Canada

source_requirements.claim_boundary: Reference source only; classification and tariff treatment require qualified review.
Reference source only; HS candidates are not tariff classification confirmation.

profiles.label: Food / Regulated Goods Reviewer
required_credential_evidence: Regulated-food, seafood, agri, plant, animal, CFIA, or import-control review experience.
Product-specific composition, intended-use, and country lane reviewed.
Dated AIRS/official-source result or reason it is not applicable.
profiles.scope: Food, seafood, agri, plant, animal, CFIA/AIRS, permit, certificate, and admissibility-language review.

source_requirements.claim_boundary: Reference source only; product-specific food import compliance requires qualified review and source verification.
Reference source only; does not replace CBSA, broker, customs, or legal review.
source_requirements.source_name: CBSA Import Commercial Goods Into Canada

profiles.label: Freight / Logistics Reviewer
required_credential_evidence: Freight forwarding, logistics, customs operations, or shipment planning experience.
Mode, route, Incoterms, packing, and party-responsibility assumptions reviewed.
Clear out-of-scope note for legal/customs approval language.
profiles.scope: Shipment path, Incoterms responsibility split, importer of record, packing, temperature, insurance, and forwarder questions.

source_requirements.claim_boundary: Reference source only; responsibility guidance requires user confirmation and qualified review where legal or contract interpretation is needed.
Reference source only; does not replace CBSA, broker, customs, or legal review.
source_requirements.source_name: CBSA Import Commercial Goods Into Canada

profiles.label: Market / Buyer Evidence Reviewer
required_credential_evidence: Trade advisory, export development, buyer research, CRM, or market validation experience.
Dated dataset/source rows and buyer-evidence level reviewed.
Explicit distinction between lead discovery, reply evidence, LOI, PO, and paid-order evidence.
profiles.scope: Market signal, buyer lead route, outreach-readiness, and demand-language review.

source_requirements.claim_boundary: Reference source only; does not prove market size, buyer demand, or revenue.
Reference source only; does not prove buyer validation, supplier fit, customs advice, or freshness of a specific product row.
Reference source only; company or market rows are research signals and lead routes, not buyer validation or demand proof.
Reference source only; does not prove buyer demand, profitability, market entry approval, or compliance.
source_requirements.source_name: World Bank World Integrated Trade Solution

profiles.label: Supplier Evidence Reviewer
required_credential_evidence: Supplier due-diligence, sourcing, inspection, trade compliance, or product certification review experience.
Attached supplier registration/product/certificate/inspection evidence reviewed.
Clear statement that the product does not certify or verify the supplier.
profiles.scope: Supplier evidence checklist, registrations, product documents, certificates, inspections, and supplier-language review.

source_requirements.claim_boundary: Reference source only; does not prove export permission, licensing status, incentive eligibility, or product-specific export compliance.
source_requirements.source_name: India Directorate General of Foreign Trade

profiles.label: Privacy / Legal Reviewer
required_credential_evidence: Privacy, legal, compliance, or data-protection review qualification.
Product-specific data-flow, retention, deletion, vendor, and AI-use scope reviewed.
Signed limitation that the finding is not blanket legal approval.
profiles.scope: Privacy notice, consent, retention, deletion, data processing, legal-language, and customer-claim boundary review.

source_requirements.claim_boundary: Reference source only; does not prove privacy compliance, legal approval, or production data-processing readiness.
source_requirements.source_name: Office of the Privacy Commissioner of Canada PIPEDA principles

profiles.label: Security / Upload Reviewer
required_credential_evidence: Application security, cloud security, secure upload, or threat-model review experience.
Evidence of tested file controls, scanning, storage isolation, authorization, CSRF/rate limits, and logging.
Hosted environment and restore/monitoring proof for production scope.
profiles.scope: File upload pipeline, malware scanning, quarantine, storage isolation, auth, audit, and deletion review.

source_requirements.claim_boundary: Reference source only; hosted upload readiness requires product-specific security controls, scans, storage isolation, and review evidence.

profiles.label: AI Safety Reviewer
required_credential_evidence: AI safety, model risk, prompt-injection, security, privacy, or product-governance review experience.
Prompt-injection test results, redaction tests, model-routing policy, and provider terms reviewed.
Explicit finding that AI remains draft-only and cannot open product gates.
profiles.scope: Prompt injection, AI data policy, redaction, no-AI path, provider terms, and model-output label review.

source_requirements.claim_boundary: Reference source only; does not prove AI safety, document safety, or model-output reliability.
Reference source only; does not certify the product or authorize AI to open compliance, customs, payment, privacy, or launch gates.

profiles.label: Report Language Reviewer
required_credential_evidence: Trade, legal/compliance, customer communication, or regulated-product wording review experience.
Exact report artifacts, blocked wording, and allowed scope language reviewed.
Approved wording list and claims the product must not make.
profiles.scope: Customer-facing report wording, uncertainty labels, blocked-claim section, and non-approval language review.

source_requirements.claim_boundary: Reference source only; does not prove a broker relationship, review, or signoff.
Reference source only; does not prove privacy compliance, legal approval, or production data-processing readiness.
source_requirements.source_name: Office of the Privacy Commissioner of Canada PIPEDA principles

source_requirements.claim_boundary: Reference source only; does not prove AI safety, document safety, or model-output reliability.

profiles.label: Payment / Billing Reviewer
required_credential_evidence: Payments, billing operations, finance, Stripe, tax/accounting, or SaaS monetization review experience.
Live-mode object, webhook, API key, duplicate/delayed/out-of-order event, logging, refund, and support evidence reviewed.
Clear confirmation that paid scope is preparation, not approval.
profiles.scope: Paid scope, refund/support wording, checkout, webhook, tax/accounting handoff, and live-payment gate review.

source_requirements.claim_boundary: Reference source only; does not prove live payment readiness, tax review, refund/support readiness, webhook safety, or secure key handling.
